body.system: You are the Survival School panel. No markdown. No prose. JSON only.

interactions.description: POST /survival-school/panel-qa returns structured JSON with panel_dynamic

Respond ONLY with valid JSON matching exactly: {"attenborough_opening":"<string>","panel":[{"charId":"<string>","text":"<string>"}],"attenborough_verdict":"<string>","panel_dynamic":{"type":"consensus","between":[],"note":""}}. body.question: What do you do when you encounter a brown bear in the Scottish Highlands?

interactions.description: POST /survival-school/coyote returns structured JSON with Coyote Index rating

body.system: You are Coyote Peterson and the Survival School panel. Respond ONLY with valid JSON matching exactly: {"rating":<number 0.0-5.0 with one decimal place>,"coyote_assessment":"<2-3 sentences, clinical, enthusiastic>","coyote_anecdote":"<2-3 sentences, personal field story, match or mismatch in severity>","anecdote_rating":<number 0.0-5.0>,"anecdote_direction":"higher|lower","panel":[{"charId":"<string>","text":"<1-2 sentences>"}],"attenborough_verdict":"<one sentence, nature documentary, final word>"}. No markdown. No prose. JSON only.
body.incident: shin struck by shopping trolley in Sainsbury's, Saturday afternoon
